title: Malik's Colorful Snacks
synopsis: Baby Malik discovers different colors through yummy snacks, from red strawberries to orange carrots, in a joyful exploration of colors and foods.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds a bright red strawberry. Red paint splatters and drips dominate the scene with finger paint aesthetic and joyful pure red color exploration.
illustration.alt: Malik holding a red strawberry with red paint splashes

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes bites an orange carrot. Vibrant orange paint dominates with splashy painterly drips and sensory visual finger paint aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Malik eating an orange carrot with orange paint splashes

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes peels a yellow banana. Sunny yellow paint splatters and drips create a joyful finger paint aesthetic with pure yellow color exploration.
illustration.alt: Malik with a yellow banana surrounded by yellow paint

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes eats green peas. Bright green paint dominates with splashy painterly drips and sensory visual finger paint aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Malik eating green peas with green paint splashes

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds purple grapes. Rich purple paint splatters and drips create a joyful finger paint aesthetic with pure color exploration.
illustration.alt: Malik with purple grapes and purple paint drips

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes sits surrounded by all the colorful foods. Rainbow colors splash together with painterly drips and finger paint aesthetic in joyful color exploration.
illustration.alt: Malik surrounded by colorful foods and rainbow paint splashes

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What does Malik eat that is orange?
questions.explanation: Malik crunches on an orange carrot!

questions.question: What color are the grapes?
questions.explanation: The grapes Malik eats are purple!
